# anthropic_tunnel_certificate (Resource)

Registers a public CA certificate for an MCP tunnel. **Requires OAuth Bearer auth + beta header `anthropic-beta: mcp-tunnels-2026-06-22` (added automatically).** PEM must contain exactly one X.509 cert with no private-key material. A tunnel holds at most two non-archived certificates. Composite import id: `<tunnel_id>:<cert_id>`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Register a CA certificate for an MCP tunnel. Beta — requires OAuth Bearer.
resource "anthropic_tunnel_certificate" "primary" {
  tunnel_id          = "tunnel_01ABC..."
  ca_certificate_pem = file("${path.module}/certs/internal-ca.pem")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ca_certificate_pem` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded X.509 CA certificate. Immutable after creation.
- `tunnel_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `fingerprint` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
